name: ws-a11y
description: WCAG 2.2 AA accessibility audit skill for AI coding agents — powered by @diegovelasquezweb/a11y-engine

scripts.sync: [ -d ~/.claude/skills/ws-a11y ] && rsync -av --delete --exclude='.git/' --exclude='.github/' --exclude='.audit/' --exclude='node_modules/' . ~/.claude/skills/ws-a11y/ ; [ -d ~/.gemini/skills/ws-a11y ] && rsync -av --delete --exclude='.git/' --exclude='.github/' --exclude='.audit/' --exclude='node_modules/' . ~/.gemini/skills/ws-a11y/ ; [ -d ~/.gemini/antigravity/skills/ws-a11y ] && rsync -av --delete --exclude='.git/' --exclude='.github/' --exclude='.audit/' --exclude='node_modules/' . ~/.gemini/antigravity/skills/ws-a11y/ ; [ -d ~/.cursor/skills/ws-a11y ] && rsync -av --delete --exclude='.git/' --exclude='.github/' --exclude='.audit/' --exclude='node_modules/' . ~/.cursor/skills/ws-a11y/ ; [ -d ~/.codex/skills/ws-a11y ] && rsync -av --delete --exclude='.git/' --exclude='.github/' --exclude='.audit/' --exclude='node_modules/' . ~/.codex/skills/ws-a11y/ ; [ -d ~/.codeium/windsurf/skills/ws-a11y ] && rsync -av --delete --exclude='.git/' --exclude='.github/' --exclude='.audit/' --exclude='node_modules/' . ~/.codeium/windsurf/skills/ws-a11y/ ; true
